goal: linear_map_kernel_submodule[R, M, N](e.src, e.dst, e.to_fn).contains(x) = (x = M.0)
linear_map_image_submodule[R, M, N](e.src, e.dst, e.to_fn).contains(y) = true
linear_map_kernel_submodule[R, N, M](e.dst, e.src, e.inv_fn).contains(y) = (y = N.0)

proof: not lib(module_hom).is_linear_equiv[R, N, M](e.dst, e.src, e.inv_fn)

not submodule_subset[R, M](linear_map_image_submodule[R, N, M](e.dst, e.src, e.inv_fn), full_submodule[R, M](linear_map_image_submodule[R, N, M](e.dst, e.src, e.inv_fn).carrier))
not lib(module_hom).is_linear_equiv[R, N, M](e.dst, e.src, e.inv_fn)
